raw:
{
  "judge_id": "JUDGE-1",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.2", "R1.4", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.2": 5,
    "R1.4": 5,
    "RX.1": 5,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 5
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.2": "The agent provides a detailed analysis of the logical consistency of the output, identifying and addressing several structural problems that would be immediately apparent to an editor or referee.",
    "R1.4": "The agent names multiple prior works and articulates the delta between them and the current work.",
    "RX.1": "The agent flags uncertainty for one clearly out-of-reach claim (the independence justification) and marks confidence and missing evidence for each recommendation.",
    "RX.3": "The output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).",
    "RX.4": "No regressions; identifies harmful patterns in the original.",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.2": 0.9,
    "R1.4": 0.8,
    "RX.1": 0.9,
    "RX.3": 1.0,
    "RX.4": 1.0,
    "RX.5": 1.0
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.2: The agent provides a detailed analysis of the logical consistency of the output, identifying and addressing several structural problems that would be immediately apparent to an editor or referee.
rationale.R1.4: The agent names multiple prior works and articulates the delta between them and the current work.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flags uncertainty for one clearly out-of-reach claim (the independence justification) and marks confidence and missing evidence for each recommendation.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).
rationale.RX.4: No regressions; identifies harmful patterns in the original.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason.
